failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch results and answered with the wrong item as the cheapest available Electric Kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and showed the Electric Kettle results sorted by ascending price. The first and cheapest available item was 1240311797 at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor used that tool output but selected item 2243454707 at $164.46, which was actually the last and most expensive listed item. This is a contradiction of the tool output, not a missing-info issue or invalid tool invocation.
